      "claim": "Response-shape changes in routes are accepted as compile-time breaking changes for all `hc` consumers, even with no runtime API change.",
      "rationale": "Typed clients mean types are the API; breaking changes are caught at client compilation.",
      "excerpt": "This is accepted: typed clients mean the types are the API.",
      "symbol_ids": [
